title: Torqumada Hanging Gardens
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Torqumada Hanging Gardens''' were located in the residential district of [[Montrol City]] near the shores of the [[Sanche Ocean]]. Senior members of the crew of the ''[[FarStar]]'' lunched with [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Olaver Lansel]] in the gardens during their stay in the city.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}}

==Sources==
